result.summary: Found 3 issues: text truncation in navigation and game card titles being cut off at the edges, suggesting responsive layout or container sizing problems.

issues.description: Navigation tab text is truncated - shows 'Hot Gar' instead of what should be 'Hot Games'
issues.suggestion: Adjust the tab container width or enable text wrapping to display full tab labels on all screen sizes

issues.description: Game card titles in 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' section are truncated - rightmost card shows 'MAGNI' (partially cut off)
issues.suggestion: Ensure game card containers have sufficient width and padding to display full titles, or implement text truncation with ellipsis (...) if space is limited

issues.description: Game card titles in 'Top Played New Games' section are truncated - rightmost card shows 'DARK' (partially cut off)
issues.suggestion: Verify carousel/grid layout is properly constrained and game cards display fully; consider implementing proper responsive behavior for smaller viewports
